title: OAuthStore symlink defense in load_from_disk is post-open and racy
description:
## Severity
Major
## Dimension
security
## Location
src/oauth.rs:460-491 (load_from_disk)
## Violation
The doc comment claims TOCTOU prevention, but the implementation is the racy ordering it warns against: fs::File::open follows a pre-existing symlink and returns a handle to the LINK TARGET; the symlink_metadata check runs AFTER open.

```rust
let file = match fs::File::open(path) { ... };
if path.symlink_metadata().is_ok_and(|sm| sm.file_type().is_symlink()) { return; }
```

A one-shot symlink open is NOT detected.
## Mandated refactor
Use OpenOptions::new().read(true).custom_flags(libc::O_NOFOLLOW).open(path). The open itself fails with ELOOP. Delete the post-open check.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
